post.subject: Too much drink, too much money... and where has it left me?
post.body: I have spent far too much money lately! I bought drink yesterday, saturday and a couple of days before that. As well as drink I have done shopping, and I spend more money on food than I know I should. Right now I have less money than I should/need to last me until i get paid again in two weeks and any time now more will come out for dvds that I bought a few days ago and money came out in the last few days for services that I dont even use but havent bothered to cancel. Its just not working out. So going back a bit, I was really going to go home on saturday, maybe even come back again that night, but I was going to go home. As it happened, I couldnt sleep (because I havent gone to sleep early in so long its hard to do it once so Im going to have to force myself into a routine), so at 6:33am I was still awake. I had watched a dvd, read a comic, started reading some of my new book, drew some crappy doodles, anything to keep me occupied until 7:am when I had planned to get a taxi to the train station - I realised that if I did go to sleep I wouldnt get up on time, so I didnt go to sleep. But then the worst thing happened, I woke up, looked at my clock and it said 12:35pm. "Fuck, I fell asleep!" I was very annoyed. I was meeting Christine for lunch, I knew ronan would be pissed, not that I care that much whether he's pissed-off or not, but I do hate him yellin at me cos he's pissed at something I did, and I miss my bro and wanted to see him this weekend. Its been 3 weeks (I think) since I've been home so Im definately going home next week - better not be working (I wish fuckin job would get my name on the fucking schedule so I'd know which fucking saturdays Im supposed to be working!) So I woke up at 12:35 and was really tired so didnt bother to move for about 1/2 an hour after that. Mum called, I told her how it happened, and she hung up on me again :( When I got up I went into town with a friend and bought some make-up for 'dressing up' and did a 'bit' of shopping in Tescos. Then back to the flat to drink and... well i cant really remember what I did on saturday, oh yeah, just drank in the flat with friends, probably went out somewhere at some point. I was so pissed off - I drank quite a lot, but wasnt overly drunk, or as drunk as I probably should have been - I have a pretty high tolarance to drink and its so bloody annoying. I think my body takes an outsiders point of view/cynical attitude, as well as my mind, stopping me from getting very drunk and going very crazy/losing control often. I dont like it much, I just end up wasting a lot of money! Yesterday, I got up at about 4, ate made myself up, a little, bought some more drink (which got lost later!) and headed to the ball in the union at 9pm, because I didnt have a ticket I wasnt very hopeful about getting in, so when I saw a friend heading in the opposite direction I went with him. We found some other friends who were heading to a bar in town. I went and didnt stay that long, I was tired and hungry and the music was shit. So I left at about 11:30 I think and got a curry chip at a chinese nearby. Then got a taxi back to the flat and drank for a bit with a friend... well he drank I was just fed up. They he proceeded to talk about fucking politics and gimme his fucking views and stories again and I really dont give a fuck, which I have told him before, but it seems its the only thing he can talk about. Its fucking annoying! I went to sleep at about 5am. Woke up at 12pm. Missed practical this morning. Have work to do for 4pm. I should get on with it, and get some food cos im hungry - more money! Although I didnt feel the effects of drink last night - I woke up feeling quite hungover...

comments.body:
Philip dont worry about your mum and bro.  I know u miss your bro but he will understand and you will see him soon.
sweetie dont worry about the not meeting with me at least.  I am always here and we can do it another time.  And sure i got to see my sick daddy so it was okay. lol
Chris
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn
